title: 正式发布：LangSmith Agent Builder
author: LangChain Accounts
content:
An agent should feel like your chief of staff: you share what you need, it figures out how to get it done, and it improves with feedback. That’s the idea behind Agent Builder.

Start by describing your goal in your own words. Agent Builder figures out the approach, guiding you from initial idea to a deployed agent ready to take on your work. It creates detailed instructions, selects the required tools, and even enlists subagents when required.

It’s different from traditional workflow automations. You don’t need to map every step, tinker with if-this-then-that branching, or babysit dependencies. You just give it feedback like you would a teammate, and the agent learns using its memory. It’s built from the ground up as an agent, with the ability to plan and iterate until it gets the job done, or seek permission before executing sensitive tasks.

Try Agent Builder free today.

No-code agents for real work

We built Agent Builder for anyone whose day gets swallowed by routine work. The research, follow-ups, updates, scheduling, and status checks that are essential to your operations, but quickly take over your calendar.

Teams have already shipped thousands of agents to production with Agent Builder. It’s especially good at tab-hopping tasks that span multiple apps, docs, and tools, like:

  • Daily briefings: Generate pre-call briefs complete with company and stakeholder research, plus relevant account context from your CRM. Get started with, “Send me a daily meeting brief.”
  • Market + competitor research: Deliver a daily Slack digest of competitor launches, notable social posts, and industry trends your team should know about. Get started with, “Send me a daily competitor update in Slack.”
  • Project tracking: Create Linear issues from PRDs in Notion or Google Docs, then create calendar events for key milestones. Get started with, “Turn my PRDs into Linear issues.”

Take your agents further

For years, our users–who are primarily developers–have asked us to help equip their co-workers to build agents without writing code. Agent Builder is our answer. What starts as a helpful productivity assistant can evolve into a core part of how your team operates and how you ship software. As your needs grow, you can extend your agents with Agent Builder's full capabilities:

  • Share agents with your team: Create an agent once, then let teammates clone and adapt it using your shared workspace.
  • Add agent capabilities with MCP: Connect additional tools through a remote MCP server, including custom integrations or tools from providers you already use.
  • Choose the right model for the job: Bring your own model to optimize for cost, latency, or capability.
  • Use agents anywhere: Embed agents in your product or call them via API as subagents inside larger graphs.

Getting started

Agent Builder is available on all LangSmith plans today. Try it free, then scale as your agent fleet grows, taking on mundane work so you can stay focused on the most important parts of your day.
aiSummary: LangSmith Agent Builder 现已正式发布，这是一个无代码平台，使用户能够通过智能规划和学习创建和部署 AI 智能体，以自动化跨多个应用程序的复杂日常任务。
oneSentenceSummary: LangSmith Agent Builder 现已正式发布，这是一个无代码平台，使用户能够通过智能规划和学习创建和部署 AI 智能体，以自动化跨多个应用程序的复杂日常任务。
summary: 文章宣布 LangSmith Agent Builder 正式发布，这是一个用于创建和部署 AI 智能体以自动化日常任务的无代码平台。它将智能体概念化为一个「首席助理」，能够理解目标、规划执行并从反馈中学习，无需显式的工作流映射或「如果-那么」逻辑。Agent Builder 帮助用户定义目标、选择工具并调用子智能体，通过强调规划、迭代和基于记忆的学习，与传统自动化区分开来。该平台旨在将个人和团队从研究、跟进和日程安排等繁琐任务中解放出来。文章重点介绍了实际应用场景，如每日简报、市场研究摘要和项目跟踪，展示了其在跨应用程序场景中的实用性。此外，文章还指出 Agent Builder 允许在团队内共享智能体，通过 MCP 扩展自定义工具功能，支持用户使用自己的模型进行优化，并可将智能体嵌入产品或通过 API 调用。

mainPoints.point: LangSmith Agent Builder 提供无代码解决方案，用于创建智能 AI 智能体。
mainPoints.explanation: 该平台允许用户用自然语言描述目标，智能体随后独立规划、执行和学习，模仿「首席助理」的角色，而非需要详细的、逐步的工作流定义。

mainPoints.point: 智能体旨在自动化跨多个应用程序的复杂日常任务。
mainPoints.explanation: Agent Builder 在生成每日简报、进行市场研究和集成项目管理工具等场景中表现出色，将用户从耗时、重复的操作工作中解放出来。

mainPoints.point: 该平台支持团队协作和自定义的高级功能。
mainPoints.explanation: 用户可以共享智能体，通过 MCP 连接自定义工具，集成自己的 LLM 以进行特定优化，并将智能体嵌入其他应用程序或作为子智能体使用，从而增强可扩展性和灵活性。

mainPoints.point: Agent Builder 通过强调规划、迭代和记忆，与传统自动化区分开来。
mainPoints.explanation: 与僵化的「如果-那么」系统不同，这些智能体能够根据反馈和过往经验进行调整和改进，提供更强大、更智能的自动化解决方案。

keyQuotes: 智能体应该像你的首席助理：你分享需求，它负责弄清楚如何完成，并通过反馈不断改进。
它与传统的工作流自动化不同。你不需要映射每个步骤，摆弄「如果-那么」分支，或操心依赖关系。
我们为那些日常被例行工作吞噬的人构建了 Agent Builder。
最初作为一个有用的生产力助手，可以演变为团队运作方式和软件交付方式的核心部分。
